.sphinxpress-doc {

.tool-search {
  margin: 0 0 0.85rem 0;
  padding: 0;

}

}

.tool-search-result-snippet {
  margin: 0.2rem 0 0 0;

  word-break: break-word;
}

.tool-search-result mark {
  background: var(--sp-search-mark);

  border-radius: 2px;
}

.tool-search-empty {
  margin: 0;

}

<div class="sphinxpress-doc">
<section id="command-line-interface">
<h1>Command-line interface</h1>
<section id="version">
<h2>Version</h2>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>text2epub<span class="w"> </span>version
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Prints the package version reported by <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">text2epub._version</span></code>.</p>
</section>
<section id="build-from-markdown">
<h2>Build from Markdown</h2>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>text2epub<span class="w"> </span>markdown<span class="w"> </span>INPUT.md<span class="w"> </span>-o<span class="w"> </span>OUTPUT.epub
text2epub<span class="w"> </span>markdown<span class="w"> </span>CHAPTER_DIR<span class="w"> </span>-o<span class="w"> </span>OUTPUT.epub<span class="w"> </span>--title<span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Book&quot;</span><span class="w"> </span>--language<span class="w"> </span>en
text2epub<span class="w"> </span>markdown<span class="w"> </span>CHAPTER_DIR<span class="w"> </span>-o<span class="w"> </span>OUTPUT.epub<span class="w"> </span>--title-page<span class="w"> </span>--toc-page<span class="w"> </span>--toc-page-numbers
text2epub<span class="w"> </span>markdown<span class="w"> </span>CHAPTER_DIR<span class="w"> </span>-o<span class="w"> </span>OUTPUT.epub<span class="w"> </span>--allow-inline-xhtml
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>When <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">CHAPTER_DIR</span></code> is a directory, direct <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">*.md</span></code> children are sorted by filename
and used as spine order. This supports manuscript folders such as:</p>
<div class="highlight-text notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>chapters/
├── 00-front-matter.md
├── 01-introduction.md
└── 02-chapter.md
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Options:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--title</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--language</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--creator</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--identifier</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--publisher</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--description</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--rights</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--date</span></code>: metadata fields.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--no-ncx</span></code>: omit the EPUB 2 NCX table of contents file.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--non-deterministic</span></code>: use fresh UUID/timestamps instead of deterministic output.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--allow-remote-resources</span></code>: allow remote image URLs to remain external.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--allow-inline-xhtml</span></code>: preserve safe inline XHTML such as <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">&lt;em&gt;</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">&lt;strong&gt;</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">&lt;span&gt;</span></code>, and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">&lt;a&gt;</span></code> in Markdown text. Raw block XHTML and unsafe attributes are rejected.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--title-page</span></code>: insert a generated reader-visible title page before the Markdown chapters.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--toc-page</span></code>: insert a generated reader-visible table of contents page after the title page, or first when no title page is requested.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--toc-page-numbers</span></code>: request automatic TOC page numbers with CSS <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">target-counter()</span></code> on the generated TOC page. Unsupported readers still show linked TOC entries.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--json</span></code>: print a machine-readable result.</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="rebuild-an-epub">
<h2>Rebuild an EPUB</h2>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>text2epub<span class="w"> </span>rebuild<span class="w"> </span>SOURCE.epub<span class="w"> </span>MANIFEST.json<span class="w"> </span>REPLACEMENTS.json<span class="w"> </span>-o<span class="w"> </span>OUTPUT.epub
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>The replacements file contains a <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">replacements</span></code> array:</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;replacements&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;block_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;spine-0001:block-000001&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;text&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Updated text.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;expected_source&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Original text.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;allow_inline_xhtml&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Options:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--allow-unresolved-tokens</span></code>: disable unresolved-token failure for rebuild output.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--json</span></code>: print the replacement report as JSON.</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="validate-an-epub">
<h2>Validate an EPUB</h2>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>text2epub<span class="w"> </span>validate<span class="w"> </span>OUTPUT.epub
text2epub<span class="w"> </span>validate<span class="w"> </span>OUTPUT.epub<span class="w"> </span>--json
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Validation checks ZIP readability, the EPUB <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">mimetype</span></code> entry,
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">META-INF/container.xml</span></code>, and unresolved-token patterns in text entries.</p>
</section>
</section>
</div>
<script data-sphinxpress-script="search" defer>
(function () {
  "use strict";

  function initForm(form) {
    var input = form.querySelector(".tool-search-input");
    var results = form.querySelector(".tool-search-results");
    var navList = form.parentElement
      ? form.parentElement.querySelector(".tool-nav-list")
      : null;
    if (!input || !results) {
      return;
    }
    var emptyText = form.getAttribute("data-search-empty") || "No matches.";
    var indexUrl = form.getAttribute("data-search-index");
    if (!indexUrl) {
      hideForm();
      return;
    }

    var indexEntries = null;
    var indexError = false;
    var pendingQuery = null;

    function hideForm() {
      form.style.display = "none";
    }

    function escapeHtml(value) {
      return value
        .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
        .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
        .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
        .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
        .replace(/'/g, "&#39;");
    }

    function showEmpty() {
      results.innerHTML =
        '<p class="tool-search-empty">' + escapeHtml(emptyText) + "</p>";
      results.hidden = false;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = true;
      }
    }

    function clearResults() {
      results.innerHTML = "";
      results.hidden = true;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = false;
      }
    }

    function renderResults(entries, tokens) {
      if (!entries.length) {
        showEmpty();
        return;
      }
      var html = entries
        .map(function (entry) {
          var snippetHtml = renderSnippet(entry, tokens);
          var href = entry.url + "#sphinxpress-search-hit";
          return (
            '<li class="tool-search-result">' +
            '<a href="' +
            escapeHtml(href) +
            '">' +
            '<p class="tool-search-result-title">' +
            escapeHtml(entry.title) +
            "</p>" +
            '<p class="tool-search-result-snippet">' +
            snippetHtml +
            "</p>" +
            "</a>" +
            "</li>"
          );
        })
        .join("");
      results.innerHTML = html;
      results.hidden = false;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = true;
      }
    }

    function renderSnippet(entry, tokens) {
      var source = entry.snippet || "";
      if (!source) {
        return "";
      }
      var lower = source.toLowerCase();
      var firstToken = tokens[0] || "";
      var idx = lower.indexOf(firstToken);
      if (idx < 0) {
        return escapeHtml(source);
      }
      var before = source.slice(0, idx);
      var match = source.slice(idx, idx + firstToken.length);
      var after = source.slice(idx + firstToken.length);
      return (
        escapeHtml(before) +
        "<mark>" +
        escapeHtml(match) +
        "</mark>" +
        escapeHtml(after)
      );
    }

    function runQuery(query) {
      if (!indexEntries) {
        return;
      }
      var tokens = query
        .toLowerCase()
        .split(/\s+/)
        .filter(function (token) {
          return token.length > 0;
        });
      if (!tokens.length) {
        clearResults();
        return;
      }
      var hits = [];
      for (var i = 0; i < indexEntries.length; i += 1) {
        var entry = indexEntries[i];
        if (!entry.sections || !entry.sections.length) {
          continue;
        }
        var matched = true;
        var score = 0;
        for (var t = 0; t < tokens.length; t += 1) {
          var token = tokens[t];
          var found = false;
          var tokenScore = 0;
          for (var s = 0; s < entry.sections.length; s += 1) {
            var section = entry.sections[s];
            var lowerText = section.lower || "";
            if (!lowerText) {
              continue;
            }
            var from = 0;
            while (from <= lowerText.length) {
              var foundAt = lowerText.indexOf(token, from);
              if (foundAt < 0) {
                break;
              }
              tokenScore += 1;
              from = foundAt + token.length;
            }
            if (tokenScore > 0) {
              found = true;
            }
          }
          if (!found) {
            matched = false;
            break;
          }
          score += tokenScore;
        }
        if (matched) {
          hits.push({ entry: entry, score: score });
        }
      }
      hits.sort(function (a, b) {
        return b.score - a.score;
      });
      var top = hits.slice(0, 20).map(function (hit) {
        return hit.entry;
      });
      renderResults(top, tokens);
    }

    function handleInput() {
      var query = input.value || "";
      if (!query.trim()) {
        clearResults();
        pendingQuery = null;
        return;
      }
      if (indexError) {
        hideForm();
        return;
      }
      if (indexEntries) {
        runQuery(query);
      } else {
        pendingQuery = query;
      }
    }

    input.addEventListener("input", handleInput);

    fetch(indexUrl, { credentials: "same-origin" })
      .then(function (response) {
        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error("HTTP " + response.status);
        }
        return response.json();
      })
      .then(function (payload) {
        if (
          !payload ||
          !Array.isArray(payload.entries) ||
          payload.entries.length === 0
        ) {
          hideForm();
          return;
        }
        indexEntries = payload.entries;
        if (pendingQuery) {
          runQuery(pendingQuery);
        }
      })
      .catch(function () {
        indexError = true;
        if (input.value && input.value.trim()) {
          hideForm();
        } else {
          hideForm();
        }
      });
  }

  function init() {
    var forms = document.querySelectorAll("form.tool-search");
    for (var i = 0; i < forms.length; i += 1) {
      initForm(forms[i]);
    }
  }

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", init);
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();

</script>
{% endraw %}
